posts.author: SamHadfield (Sam H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When the same location is used for a multiple items, only the most recently added item will show on the map pin.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to see all items assigned to that location when I click on the pin. The pin could have a number on it to detail how many items are pinned there, similar to the blue round number that appears when the map is zoomed out for several pins in a wider location.
